title: obione coquimbana
intro: Obione coquimbana, also known as beach morning glory or coastal morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Obione coquimbana include reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain cardiovascular and respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried leaves and stems can be used in herbal remedies.
